zh.lifeSummary: 當Lauretta van Saarbrücken於大約1192年出生在德國薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯時，她的父親Simon von Saarbrücken II43歲，母親Luitgard von Leiningen37歲。她於1214年與Geoffroi II d'Aspremont在德國薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年11月13日在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lauretta van Saarbrücken于大约1192年出生在德国薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯时，她的父亲Simon von Saarbrücken II43岁，母亲Luitgard von Leiningen37岁。她于1214年与Geoffroi II d'Aspremont在德国薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1271年11月13日在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Lauretta van Saarbrücken was born about 1192, in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germany, her father, Simon von Saarbrücken II, was 43 and her mother, Luitgard von Leiningen, was 37. She married Geoffroi II d'Aspremont in 1214, in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 13 November 1271, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 80.

fr.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lauretta van Saarbrücken est née environ 1192, à Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne, son père, Simon von Saarbrücken II, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Luitgard von Leiningen, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroi II d'Aspremont en 1214, à Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1271, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lauretta van Saarbrücken um 1192 in Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon von Saarbrücken II 43 und ihre Mutter Luitgard von Leiningen 37. Sie hat 1214 in Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Deutschland Geoffroi II d'Aspremont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. November 1271 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lauretta van Saarbrücken è nata il circa 1192 nel Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germania, sua padre, Simon von Saarbrücken II, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Luitgard von Leiningen, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroi II d'Aspremont nel 1214, nel Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 13 novembre 1271, nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lauretta van Saarbrückenが約1192年にドイツサアルランドクレイス サアルブルuクンサアルブルuクンで生まれた時，父Simon von Saarbrücken IIは43歳，母Luitgard von Leiningenは37歳であった。1214年にドイツサアルランドクレイス サアルブルuクンサアルブルuクンでGeoffroi II d'Aspremontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年11月13日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lauretta van Saarbrücken(이)가 대략 1192년 독일 사알랜드 크레이스 사아르브uc켄 사아르브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon von Saarbrücken II(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Luitgard von Leiningen(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1214년 독일 사알랜드 크레이스 사아르브uc켄 사아르브uc켄에서 Geoffroi II d'Aspremont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 11월 13일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 클브에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lauretta van Saarbrücken nasceu aproximadamente 1192, em Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemanha, seu pai, Simon von Saarbrücken II, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Luitgard von Leiningen, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroi II d'Aspremont em 1214, em Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1271, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lauretta van Saarbrücken родилась около 1192 г. в местности саарбрuккен, крис саарбрuккен, саарланд, Германия, её отцу по имени Simon von Saarbrücken II было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Luitgard von Leiningen, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroi II d'Aspremont в 1214 г. в местности саарбрuккен, крис саарбрuккен, саарланд, Германия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 ноября 1271 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lauretta van Saarbrücken nació aproximadamente 1192, en Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemania, su papá, Simon von Saarbrücken II, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Luitgard von Leiningen, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Geoffroi II d'Aspremont en 1214, en Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1271, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 80 años.
